programme.title: Sydney to the Max: How the Syd Stole Christmas
programme.desc: After steering clear of the holidays due to her mother's passing, Syd finds a new fondness for Christmas.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: It's Christmas, Gabby Duran
programme.desc: Olivia and Gabby are excited to see their dad for the holidays, but when a snowstorm ruins those plans, Gabby enlists Swift's shapeshifting ability to create a substitute dad.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie's Aloha Holidays With Parker and Joey
programme.desc: Parker and Joey, Jessie and the Ross kids decide to plan a tropical Christmas at the family's Hawaiian villa. Jessie reunites with old friend and superstar, Shayelee Michaels.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Mix-Ups and Mistletoes
programme.desc: Trish is organizing a Kids Club holiday party at which Austin and Ally will perform their original holiday song and distribute Austin Moon dolls, but a mix-up at the factory leads to a scramble.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Santa’s and Surprises
programme.desc: When one of Austin and Ally's music students is sad about spending Christmas away from her father, the gang rallies around her to try and make her happy.

programme.title: Bizaardvark: Agh, Humbug
programme.desc: Bernie goes on social media star Rosanna Pansino's baking show to try to get 10,000 subscribers to fulfill his dream of being invited to the Vuuugle holiday party, along with his buddies, Paige, Frankie, Dirk and Amelia.

programme.title: Bizaardvark: A Killer Robot Christmas
programme.desc: Paige invites a group of deserving kids to Vuuugle to celebrate the holidays with Bizaardvark.

programme.title: Bizaardvark: Holiday Video Sketchtacular
programme.desc: Paige and Frankie enlist their friends to help create a Holiday Video Sketchtacular special.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: The Communicators
programme.desc: A weekly program focusing on the politics of telecommunications through conversations with the people who shape the digital future.

programme.title: Snapped: Brandy Stutzman
programme.desc: The murder of a U.S. Airman leads Las Vegas investigators down a twisted path to one woman's offbeat oasis and ties to an unusual fan club.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong, a robbery that resulted in the murder of Ralph Candelario's wife, Pam. Ralph was found at the crime scene dazed and confused but his confusing story had police questioning his version of events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Waiting
programme.desc: When a captivating, sweet natured single mom was found dead in her garage, detectives in Frisco, Texas uncovered a series of potential suspects, all of them connected in different ways to her complicated and secretive life.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Tanasha Siena
programme.desc: A 17-year relationship ends in gunfire, leaving two children fatherless.

programme.title: Snapped: Deborah Huiett
programme.desc: The discovery of an unidentified woman’s decomposed body in a roadside ditch leads to a mystery that unravels a deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Michele Donohue
programme.desc: She said her husband ran away with his much younger mistress, but after years of suspicion, police find him much closer to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Erin Everett
programme.desc: Erin reports a brutal attack on her friend turned lover, but a secret relationship and allegations of abuse add a surprising twist to the investigation.

programme.title: Snapped: Heather Miller
programme.desc: A best friend’s betrayal reveals a woman’s plot to murder her husband. The trail reveals shocking secrets of witchcraft, poison and juicy neighborhood affairs.

programme.title: Snapped: Ann Trexler
programme.desc: Grandma Ann Trexler moved to Florida to spend more time with her granddaughter. When the girl's father decided to move her to Montana, Ann hired a hitman to bring the relocation plan to a dead stop.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Dakota James
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigate the mysterious 2017 drowning death of a graduate student in Pittsburgh and explore whether the case is connected to the Smiley Face Killer theory they've been investigating for the past decade.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Luke Homan
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives travels to La Crosse, Wisconsin, to investigate the 2006 death of a college basketball player. They believe La Crosse is ground zero for their Smiley Face Killer theory with multiple drowning deaths of college-aged men.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Will Hurley
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives travels to Boston to investigate the 2009 death of a young Navy veteran. The victim's girlfriend spoke to him just minutes before he vanished and the team believes his death could be the work of the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Brian Welzien
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigate the death of a college honors student who disappeared in Chicago on the Eve of Y2K and was found on a beach in Indiana 77 days later. The team believes the case could be related to the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Tommy Booth
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigate the 2008 death of a young man in a Philadelphia suburb who was found 14 days after he went missing in an area that had been searched. The team believes his death could be related to the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Todd Geib
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigates the 2005 death of a man who was found in a rural Michigan lake 21 days after he went missing. With little decomposition to the body, the team believes the death could be the work of the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Winkler
programme.desc: Desperate to find her way out of financial crisis and escape a troubled marriage, this wholesome preacher's wife exchanged virtue for the ultimate vice.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Chris Watts: Confession Untold
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the devastating truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: After getting a call that a wife and mother had been missing for 10 years, sheriffs launch an investigation that uncovers a threesome relationship, an eerie deathbed confession, and a web of lies spanning a decade that leads them to the truth.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Thanksgiving Terror
programme.desc: A mother is brutally shot to death while driving her sons home from a Thanksgiving celebration. When the hunt for her killer leads to an unlikely suspect, investigators soon realize her murder is not as random as it once seemed.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, a young couple is found murdered inside their Florida home. Neighbors can't imagine the couple had been in the area long enough to make a mortal enemy. Police uncover deeply personal details, and soon expose a deadly secret.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Carnage in Carnation
programme.desc: The holiday season screeches to a halt when six members of the Anderson family are discovered to have been gunned down in their home. Detectives work closely with family friends to track down the shocking murderer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons 138th Episode Spectacular
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts this look back at The Simpsons' first eight seasons, featuring vintage clips, outtakes and highlights of the previous episodes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Be Not Proud
programme.desc: Bart is caught stealing a video game at a local store and desperately tries to hide this from his parents. When a family portrait is ruined as a result, Marge decides that it is her fault for mothering him too much.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Team Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns decides to join Homer's bowling team after becoming the sponsor. Bart's shirt leads to the implementation of uniforms at school, causing a loss of individuality and creativity.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Homer's garage sale is upstaged by George Bush, who is moving in across the street. When Bart receives a spanking, Homer starts a prank war that escalates into a one-on-one confrontation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Scenes From a Class Struggle in Springfield
programme.desc: While wearing an expensive suit found at an outlet mall, Marge meets a former schoolmate who invites her and the family to the country club. Marge soon becomes obsessed with trying to fit in with high society, while Homer takes up golf.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Fink
programme.desc: Bart inadvertently gets Krusty in trouble with the IRS by uncovering Krusty's tax-cheating ways. Soon after, Krusty is presumed dead when his plane crashes and a heartbroken Bart keeps thinking he sees Krusty in public.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Iconoclast
programme.desc: As the town's bicentennial parade approaches, Homer campaigns successfully for the job of town crier. Meanwhile, Lisa encounters disbelief from everyone when she uncovers evidence that the town hero may have been a fraud.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Smithers
programme.desc: When Smithers takes a much-needed vacation, Homer is hired as a temporary replacement. After Homer loses his temper, Mr. Burns tackles some of the basic tasks himself and his newfound independence leaves Smithers jobless.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Violence Died
programme.desc: Bart helps a homeless man prove he was the rightful creator of Itchy and Scratchy. But when the man is awarded damages in court, the Itchy and Scratchy studios have to close for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Fish Called Selma
programme.desc: Actor Troy McClure takes Selma out on a date in return for passing his eye test at the DMV. His sagging career is suddenly given a boost when he is seen in public with Selma, leading to marriage for both.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart on the Road
programme.desc: With a fake ID in hand, Bart, Nelson, Martin and Milhouse rent a car to visit the World's Fair in Knoxville, Tennessee. When they get stranded, Bart gets help from Lisa, who is spending her vacation with Homer at the power plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 22 Short Films About Springfield
programme.desc: While Bart and Milhouse wonder if anything interesting ever happens in Springfield, various residents find themselves in unusual situations.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Curse of the Flying Hellfish
programme.desc: Abe enlists Bart's help to stop Mr. Burns' plot to steal a legacy of art treasures from their platoon days during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Much Apu About Nothing
programme.desc: After an increase in taxes, an anti-immigration fever hits Springfield. Apu turns to the Simpson family and gets Homer's 'help' in preparing for his citizenship test.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerpalooza
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with trying to appear 'cool' in front of his kids and their friends. While attending the Lollapalooza music festival, Homer inadvertently becomes a popular sideshow act when he gets hit in the stomach by a cannonball.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Summer of 4 Ft. 2
programme.desc: The Simpsons are off for a summer vacation at a beach house, but Lisa is worried about not having any friends to bring along. Lisa re-invents herself and quickly befriends local kids, causing a jealous Bart to sabotage her new friendships.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VII
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa find Bart's demented twin brother; Lisa's develops a higher form of life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Only Move Twice
programme.desc: Homer moves the family to a new town after he receives another job offer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Homer They Fall
programme.desc: Moe sees that Homer can absorb massive blows to the head and decides to turn him into a boxer. Despite being a terrible boxer, the resilient Homer is soon pitted against a former heavyweight champion that has just been released from prison.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Burns Baby Burns
programme.desc: While returning from an apple mill, the family picks up a hitchhiker and discover that he is Mr. Burns' illegitimate son, Larry. When Mr. Burns can't stand Larry's obnoxious ways, Homer tries to stage a fake kidnapping to unite father and son.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart After Dark
programme.desc: As punishment for destroying private property, Homer insists Bart works for the homeowner to pay off the damages. He soon discovers the house is actually a burlesque parlour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Milhouse Divided
programme.desc: Marge decides to hold a dinner party with other married couples. As the party winds down, Milhouse's parents get into a huge argument and decide to divorce, causing Homer to worry that his own marriage may be in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's Date With Density
programme.desc: Lisa falls for Nelson's rebellious ways and sets out to change his ways. Homer obtains a telemarketing machine, but his auto-dialer gets him in trouble with the law.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hurricane Neddy
programme.desc: A hurricane comes through Springfield and spares everyone but the Flanders home. After thieves loot Ned's store and his rebuilt home crumbles to the ground, Ned suffers a nervous breakdown and checks into an asylum.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Mysterious Voyage of Homer
programme.desc: Homer experiences hallucinatory visions after consuming too many exotic hot peppers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Springfield Files
programme.desc: Homer claims to have witnessed something out of this world in the Springfield woods.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Twisted World of Marge Simpson
programme.desc: Marge is thrown out of the women's investment group, so she buys a Pretzel Wagon franchise. When her business struggles to thrive, Homer secretly makes a deal with Fat Tony and the Mob.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: Mr. Burns organizes a mountain retreat to promote teamwork and finds himself paired with Homer. While the rest of the family looks for things to do, Homer and Mr. Burns are trapped in the cabin by an avalanche.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsoncalifragilisticexpiala(D'Oh)cious
programme.desc: When Marge starts showing signs of high stress and overwork, Homer interviews nannies. No one seems to be qualified until Shary Bobbins arrives, and everyone quickly grows dependent on her and her songs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Itchy & Scratchy & Poochie Show
programme.desc: Low ratings force Itchy and Scratchy to take on a new character, Poochie the dog. Homer ends up providing the voice for the new character, but everyone hates his character. Meanwhile, a new guy named Roy stays with the Simpsons family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Phobia
programme.desc: When Homer discovers that his new friend John is homosexual, he fears Bart will emulate him. Bart's effeminate behaviour causes Homer to take drastic actions.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Brother From Another Series
programme.desc: Bart suspects a sinister motive when Sideshow Bob reunites with his estranged brother, Cecil. When Lisa and Bart uncover evidence, Cecil reveals that he is the one who is out to destroy Springfield with a new dam.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Sister, My Sitter
programme.desc: Lisa starts her own baby-sitting business. Bart grows angry when Lisa is hired to baby-sit him and decides to make her look bad any way he can.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. the 18th Amendment
programme.desc: When prohibition hits Springfield, Homer and Bart take matters into their own hands and begin a bootleg operation out of Moe's Bar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grade School Confidential
programme.desc: When Bart finds Principal Skinner and Mrs. Krabappel kissing, he becomes their confidante.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Canine Mutiny
programme.desc: Bart gets a credit card and goes on a shopping spree, which includes buying a purebred dog. When the repo men arrive to take back everything, Bart gives them Santa's Little Helper instead of his new dog and soon regrets it.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Old Man and the Lisa
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns loses his house and fortune, he begs Lisa to help him regain his wealth. Using Lisa's recycling program, Mr. Burns slowly gains fortune to proceed with a plan to sweep fish out of the ocean in order to make slurry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: In Marge We Trust
programme.desc: Marge volunteers to the church and dispenses valuable advice, which depresses Reverend Lovejoy. Meanwhile, Homer is intrigued by a Japanese product that seems to have his face on it.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Enemy
programme.desc: Frank Grimes, a man who has had a very difficult life, becomes the new employee at the power plant and quickly clashes with Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Spin-Off Showcase
programme.desc: Troy McClure introduces three possible spin-offs from the series, including 'Chief Wiggum P.I.,' 'The Love-Matic Grampa' and 'The Simpson Family Smile-Time Variety Hour.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: Bart's prank lands him a stint in military school. Lisa witnesses the discipline the cadets receive and decides to become the first female ever to join the academy, only to have a hard time fitting in.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The City of New York vs. Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Homer gets a notice from the New York City police to pick up his illegally parked car.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Principal and the Pauper
programme.desc: A man claiming to be Seymour Skinner appears at a surprise party for Principal Skinner. The town tries to get used to the real Seymour Skinner, who was held as a POW in Vietnam for 26 years, but Edna and Agnes miss the old Skinner.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's Sax
programme.desc: Homer and Marge tell the story of how Lisa originally got her saxophone back in 1990. When a school counsellor notices Lisa is a child prodigy, Homer's inability to pay for a preschool leads him to purchase a saxophone for her instead.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VIII
programme.desc: Homer battles mutants, Bart morphs with a fly and Marge tells the history of Halloween.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Cartridge Family
programme.desc: Homer purchases a gun and joins the National Rifle Association. When Homer continues to use his firearm in an irresponsible way, Marge takes the kids to a local motel.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Star
programme.desc: Homer becomes a Pee Wee football coach causing Bart to be ostracized by his teammates.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Two Mrs. Nahasapeemapetilons
programme.desc: Apu receives a symbol from his mother, indicating it is time for his arranged marriage.

programme.title: Movie: National Lampoon's European Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswalds head to Europe when they win a deluxe tour of the Old World.

programme.title: Movie: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family (Clark, Ellen and their two children, Rusty and Audrey) set out to take a road trip across the country to vacation at Walley World. Unfortunately nothing goes as Clark had planned and the family finds themselves in bad situations.

programme.title: Movie: Vegas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswolds go on vacation in Las Vegas when Clark gets a bonus at work for developing a food preservative.

programme.title: Movie: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The world is astounded when a reclusive candy manufacturer randomly places golden tickets inside chocolate bar wrappers, which will allow five lucky people to tour his unusual factory.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include: Dame Judi Dench, Jennifer Hudson, Hugh Grant, Matthew McConaughey, Michael Bublé and Coldplay.

programme.desc: A British Minister falls through a whole in the Earth but continues his speech.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus: Dinsdale
programme.desc: Probe into the careers of the notorious Piranha Brothers: Doug and Dinsdale.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mission Galapagos: Cauldron of Life
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin and a scientific teams travel to the Galapagos Islands.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mission Galapagos: Secrets of the Deep
programme.desc: Liz searches for the mola, an elusive ocean giant.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mission Galapagos: Future Frontiers
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin explores the oldest islands in the Galapagos, where she descends into a lava cave.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Enchanted Kingdom
programme.desc: Narrated by Idris Elba, explore seven distinct worlds in the wildest continent on Earth, Africa, to discover that nature is so much more surprising and extraordinary than ever imagined.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Emperor Penguin
programme.desc: A colony of penguins try to keep themselves alive through the winter in Atka Bay.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Painted Wolf
programme.desc: The dynasty is threatened when a pained wolf matriarch feuds with her daughter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Tiger
programme.desc: A tigress fends off rivals set on taking over her turf, all while protecting her young cubs.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Chimpanzee
programme.desc: David, an alpha chimpanzee's leadership is threatened.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Lions
programme.desc: The lioness leader of a once mighty pride must now battle for their very survival.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Losing Las Vegas
programme.desc: When inmates do time on the inside, family does time on the outside.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Misfits and Outcasts
programme.desc: Hard times are promised to those who stick out in jail as it's a dangerous place to be, but for some inmates it's the only option.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: The Outsiders
programme.desc: Two Georgia prisons - Jackson and Coastal - absorb a flood of new inmates, while four prisoners struggle to adapt to a new reality of life behind bars.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Women on Lockdown
programme.desc: Every female offender in the state begins their Hard Time at Metro State Prison in Atlanta. We'll meet a variety of inmates, including a straight 'A' student turned druggie and murderers serving life terms.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Moms on Trial

programme.desc: Two mothers accused of gruesome murders refuse to admit guilt, taking a gamble on a trial.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Giants of the Deep
programme.desc: Discover the lives of some of the great predators that haunt the vast oceanic desert including blue whales and hordes of tuna.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Sand Wars
programme.desc: Discover the multitudes of bizarre creatures that make the sandy plains of the seabed their home.

programme.title: Giants of the Deep Blue
programme.desc: Go beneath the surface for an extraordinary look and listen at these majestic whales.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.desc: Join National Geographic's Pristine Seas as they explore the exciting, complex and unique waters of the Galapagos Islands.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Return of the Dragon
programme.desc: Dr. K sees a macaw with a broken wing and a bearded dragon is rushed in as an emergency.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Hubble Trouble
programme.desc: Hubble, a crested gecko, comes rushing into the clinic after being attacked by the family dog.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Pain in the Beak
programme.desc: Dr. T and Dyanne are called out to a nature center to examine a male peacock.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Prairie Dog Companion
programme.desc: A prairie dog comes in for an examination after he mysteriously lost his top teeth.

programme.title: Bandit Patrol: Out Foxed
programme.desc: It is baby season and Kristin and Linda are knee-deep, finding time to care for the animals that require the utmost attention.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Maston/ Young
programme.desc: A man who had it all loses everything after his wife leaves him, taking their only child with her. Despondent over the loss, he robs a gas station and then leads police on a high-speed chase through the city streets of Indianapolis.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Vachagan
programme.desc: A man with everything going for him falls prey to drugs, leading him to crime.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Scott/ Trey
programme.desc: A man starts new life only to find himself caught up in a high-speed pursuit due to drugs.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Murder in Vegas
programme.desc: Civil Rights Attorney Benjamin Crump recruits a team of experts, friends and relatives to investigate the murder of Tupac Shakur.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Crips vs. Bloods
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team investigate the theory that a known gang member, Orlando Anderson, is responsible for the murder of Tupac Shakur. The team looks into never before seen footage of Orlando, and examines his motive.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: East Coast vs. West Coast
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team investigate the theory that the East Coast vs West Coast rap rivalry led to Tupac’s murder. A key witness provides startling information.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Devil in a Red Suit
programme.desc: The investigative team dives into the chaotic relationship between Tupac Shakur and his label head, Marion (Suge) Knight. They explore whether Tupac's departure from Death Row was motive enough for Suge to turn on their friendship.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Death Row Takeover
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts examine the rumored Death Row coup that may have led to Tupac's murder.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Time for Justice
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts analyze the authenticity of a recently revealed mystery confession letter. New evidence emerges that may break the case wide open.

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom
programme.desc: An inside-the-walls look at the violent history of Folsom Prison, which opened in 1880.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Riding Solo
programme.desc: Henry Conravey has successfully completed 12 weeks of field training but after a series of mistakes is not sure he'll be allowed to patrol the streets on his own. Chris Cade is looking forward to getting is own patrol car.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Size Doesn't Matter
programme.desc: Rookie Amy Hess proves size doesn't matter after finishing a week where she pushes a car and participates in her first SWAT hit. Tommie Tolbert tries to keep an arson victim from attacking the assailant's mother.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Toy Gun
programme.desc: Rebecca Webster was the only female rookie in her Academy class. She knows that as a woman in a man's world, she's going to have to work twice as hard to prove herself. However, Rebecca's rush to do everything on her own just might backfire on her.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Lost Rookie
programme.desc: Charles was an officer in the military for several years, but is starting at the bottom again as a rookie cop in Jefferson Parish. When he disobeys protocol, Greg is furious and worried for his safety.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult: Pilot
programme.desc: Leslie Wagner-Wilson spent her formative years as a member of the People's Temple under the guidance of Jim Jones. When the church uproots amidst scandal and settles in Guyana, Leslie is convinced to follow.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: Flora Jessop was born at the bottom of an oppressive hierarchy established by the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, or the FLDS. Growing up in Colorado City, Arizona, she suffered greatly at the hands of her father.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two adopted sisters are inseparable until the social pressures of high school and bullying drive a wedge of violence between them.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Torment
programme.desc: After years of struggling with mental health issues, Janece Cook moves in with her elderly parents. But when the family patriarch commits suicide, her younger sister is determined to sever Janece's ties with the family.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Bye Bye Baby
programme.desc: Deep-seated envy between two pregnant sisters leads to a twisted murder plot in an unsuspecting Midwestern town. This unspeakable crime leaves the Merrifield family destroyed forever.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Dead Ringers
programme.desc: The Beck twins spend their entire lives side by side in the same house, until the day one of them decides that she's had enough.

programme.title: A Christmas Party Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a high-flying corporate executive finds his wife dead after a raucous Christmas party, police suspect foul play and unearth the horrifying truth.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery: A Killer on the Loose
programme.desc: Look deep inside the homicide case of JonBenét that gripped the nation – with exclusive interviews and never-before-seen footage from the crime scene, hours after her body was found.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery: Pool of Suspects
programme.desc: As the Boulder Police zero in on the Ramsey family as culpable of JonBenét's murder, the case is turned on its head when a crop of shocking new suspects emerges.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery: He Calls Himself Daxis
programme.desc: The JonBenét Ramsey murder case takes an alarming turn when an anonymous confession comes to light in an unlikely location – 8,000 miles away from Colorado. In an exclusive interview, we hear from the only person ever arrested for JonBenét's murder.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery: A Killer on the Loose
programme.desc: Look deep inside the homicide case of JonBenét that gripped the nation – with exclusive interviews and never-before-seen footage from the crime scene, hours after her body was found.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery: Pool of Suspects
programme.desc: As the Boulder Police zero in on the Ramsey family as culpable of JonBenét's murder, the case is turned on its head when a crop of shocking new suspects emerges.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery: He Calls Himself Daxis
programme.desc: The JonBenét Ramsey murder case takes an alarming turn when an anonymous confession comes to light in an unlikely location – 8,000 miles away from Colorado. In an exclusive interview, we hear from the only person ever arrested for JonBenét's murder.

programme.title: A Christmas Party Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a high-flying corporate executive finds his wife dead after a raucous Christmas party, police suspect foul play and unearth the horrifying truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Letter From San Quentin
programme.desc: Kevin Cooper was sentenced to death for the murders of four people in the Chino Hills massacre of 1983, but as investigators look back at the DNA evidence, more questions are raised about Cooper's possible innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Was Kevin Cooper Framed?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates whether new DNA evidence can save the life of a man on death row for killing four people in California. Twenty years ago he wrote '48 Hours' claiming he was framed, and new tests may answer that question.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Blinded From the Truth
programme.desc: All Debra Hartmann desired was a life of luxury. She seemed to have it all: fur coats, fancy car, and a boyfriend. There is only one thing getting in her way of the perfect life: her husband.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: The Price of Greed
programme.desc: Betty Lou Lazarra's stunning looks have always taken her far in life. But when this single mom meets wealthy businessman, Al Haber, she won't rest on her appearance alone.Betty Lou's stepkids discover the hard way just how determined and evil she can be.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Hitmom
programme.desc: When Sueanne Hobson weds a widower with a son, life seems perfect. But looks can be deceiving. Behind closed doors, Sueanne's relationship with her stepson is in turmoil. Before long, she decides the only solution is to make him disappear forever.

programme.title: Home Alone: Portrait of a Stalker
programme.desc: In 2007, 17-year old Katie is living in Tennessee with her doting parents. But Katie's been keeping secrets, and her parents are shocked to discover she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Home Alone: Banking on Fear
programme.desc: Valerie and Matthew Yussman have their worlds turned upside down when masked intruders break into their home. But this is no normal robbery -- these professional criminals want $1 million and they will use a bomb to ensure they get it.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Doorbell Rang Twice
programme.desc: Newlyweds Kristi and Jim Newman have their Christian beliefs tested to the limit when they come face to face with three masked men in their home. The intruders aren't just here to rob them, they're here to break their souls.

programme.title: Home Alone: A Mother and a Maniac
programme.desc: On the night of May 10, 2017, Haley McHam decides to leave her abusive partner Jamie. But when Jamie shows up the next day, nobody could have predicted the tragic home invasion that will leave Haley pleading for her life.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Become a Neo-Nazi
programme.desc: John Ditullio beat a homeless man to death and killed a neighbour who he felt was an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Master Bedroom and Library
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin restores a master bedroom and library in an amazing stone home in Bucks County, PA. The original home dates back to 1700 but the two rooms sit in additions that came later and lack some of the historic character.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1717 Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a kitchen and living area in a rundown 1717 farmhouse. The original hardwood floors are a mess, the foyer and living room are drab and the kitchen addition doesn't match the character of the original house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Master Suite in a Barn
programme.desc: John and Tina own a converted 1740s barn and they need help with their awkward master bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: 'Til Death Do Us Flip

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: After a contractor holds Laura and Greg's new kitchen hostage for four months, even threatening to put a lien on their home, the desperate couple turn to the one contractor they can trust.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Sea World Birthday Bash
programme.desc: The bakers are presented a whale of a challenge when they are told to use seaweed and sea salt in their cupcakes. Some will sink, but others will swim to the top of the competition.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: People's Choice Awards
programme.desc: Viewers choose the ingredients as bakers compete for a People's Choice Awards showcase.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Fran Drescher's Cancer Schmancer
programme.desc: Four vegan competitors will battle to be part of Cancer Schmancer.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Naughty Or Nice
programme.desc: Three bakers run the gamut from naughty to nice as they vie to create the definitive gingerbread showpiece. The competitors receive a competition curveball mid-challenge that requires them to switch gears.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Elf
programme.desc: Three bakers are challenged with creating a gingerbread scene inspired by the classic holiday movie 'Elf.' Host Marcela Valladolid throws a wrench in the works by challenging the bakers to create quick holiday treats for the judges to sample.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Santa's Most Incredible Workshop
programme.desc: Three bakers find fierce competition as they race to create their take on a magical gingerbread 'North Pole'. They're thrown a twist and have to think fast to create a holiday treat that's both delicious and a practical part of their final creations.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Ultimate Holiday Celebration
programme.desc: Our three finalists go all out to see who can create their biggest 'Ultimate Holiday Celebration' scene. Each baker pulls out all the stops and incorporates their own personal touches to their elaborate creations as well as holiday treats for the judges.

programme.title: Holiday Cookie Builds: A Christmas Carol Creation
programme.desc: Hale Centre Theatre in Salt Lake City is launching its 34th season of 'A Christmas Carol,' and Brenda Nibley and Alisha Nuttal are asked to create their grandest and most theatrical cookie build ever to mark the occasion.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Let Them Eat (Holiday) Cake!
programme.desc: As Ben artfully brings a reindeer to life, Phil and Christine master the details of their intricately designed cake presents. Eloise celebrates the city with a cake full of local landmarks, and Molly creates a fairy-tale ending with her gingerbread house.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Let the Flames Begin!
programme.desc: The chefs are fired up to create unique signature dishes in the Wildfire Round. Where there's smoke, there's fire, and the Crossfire Round brings the heat.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Comfort
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America. He's in the kitchen revealing comfort-loving chefs' soul-warming secrets.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Shrimp Tacos, Mofongo and Stuffed Pita
programme.desc: Brad heads to Malibu, California, to find a shrimp-centric food truck whose tempura-battered Baja shrimp tacos take the crave-able crustacean to the next level. Next, he travels to Los Angeles to try out a one-of-a-kind, homestyle Puerto Rican mofongo.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Loaded Hot Dogs, Shrimp Po' Boys and PB and J
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Las Vegas, Nev., to visit El Shuko, a food truck serving up traditional Guatemalan street food to the hungry masses. Chef Yasser Zermino and his brother, Christian, bring a taste of Central America to an American favourite.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Brunch Beauties
programme.desc: Michael McKean skips breakfast and forgets about lunch so he can get to the bottom of brunch. He discovers how eggs Benedict was blessed by a pope and that we may have a melty mishap to thank for the croque monsieur.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Repo Mantis/ Down with the Sickness
programme.desc: After learning that the Jupiter Jim moon buggy has been repossessed, the TMNT need to do a job to get it back. The Turtles must endure Splinter's Rat Flu and the terrible seven stages that come with it.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: One Man's Junk/ Snow Day
programme.desc: The turtles argue about how to get a piece of the mystic metal from Repo Mantis. Ghostbear decides to mess with the turtles during a snow day.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: All Aboard the Snakeybus

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: A Year Without Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis confronts Krampus over slacking on the job and inadvertently gets him to take a vacation. Now she must team up with a strange bearded guy named Santa to save Creepmas.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: In the Name of the Rebellion: Part One

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: In the Name of the Rebellion: Part Two

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium / Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat

programme.desc: Investigating a wide range of suspects and evidence in the killing of JonBenet, including the Ramsey's maid, and the man who portrayed Santa Claus at a holiday party, only days before JonBenet was found murdered.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mile High Mischief
programme.desc: A hostile points battle becomes even more intense as drivers struggle to adjust to the 'mile high' altitude at Colorado's Bandimere Speedway.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Texas' Last Stand
programme.desc: The points race has heated up to an all-time high and the racers are willing to do anything to get ahead. Ryan still leads in points but Lizzy and Kye are hot on his heels. Meanwhile, Team Texas sees their chances of winning slip further out of reach.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Callout Karma
programme.desc: Round two hits the racers at a time when every decision can either make or break them. Points leader Ryan Martin becomes painfully aware of the consequences of his decisions when it matters most.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fireball Flameout
programme.desc: With two races left in the season, drivers are hustling to rack up points. On the brink of another championship, Ryan feels the pressure. Team NOLA forms an unexpected alliance in an attempt to increase their chances of winning an NPK trophy.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Don't Choke
programme.desc: Ryan rolls into the final event at the top of the leaderboard and with each round worth double points, the pressure is on to not let the elusive NPK trophy slip away for a third time. Kye, Lizzy and Scott do everything in their power to derail him.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: The racers are in South Carolina. As the weather improves, the racers turn it up to win the fastest semi-finals and finals the series has ever seen.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Dunn and Dunn
programme.desc: Chuck, Birdman, and Ryan Martin continue to fight for points.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Dead Men Tell No Tales

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Angels, Fire and Doll Spirits
programme.desc: Josh Gates shines a light on the death of demoness in India, a citywide inferno in a Spanish town and an island haunted by the spirits of dolls.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: City of Stone

programme.title: The Tidewater Boats Elite Redfish Series: The Tidewater Boats Championship, South Padre Island, TX

programme.desc: More Important Than You Think; Touring Alaska; On-The-Road: RV Geeks' Peter and John.

programme.desc: Mark chases an old warrior known as the Enchanted 9 in his home state of Iowa.
