programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Billionaire Glenn Sterns hits a breaking point, and attempts a rebound and shares advice on starting a business.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Going All In
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns goes all in, gambling all the money he's won so far. As a successful businessman, he knows that taking a risk can be a recipe for success.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Doubling Down
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns fights to keep his million-dollar dream alive with a bold plan to expand his business, but risks losing his start-up funds. But building a business requires ingenuity and determination, as he has learned from his struggles and successes.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Underdog Millionaire
programme.desc: Glenn is sent scrambling after losing a critical deal. The underdogs work together to flip a house that could save the business and change their lives. Along the way, Glenn offers tips for rebuilding a business.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Unmasked
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team races to prepare for their opening day, only to have work come to halt when Glenn accidentally reveals his true identity. Building a successful business can involve some stumbles, Glenn advises.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Make or Break
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team's plans for their big debut go up in flames, threatening Glenn's chances for success. Glenn battles to save the company, sharing his tips for sustaining a business along the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: No Room for Compromise
programme.desc: Petite bride Christine is looking for a gown to match her '20s theme-inspired wedding. Stefanny wants a sexy dress to wear on her big day, but her parents have other ideas. Valentina returns for her fitting to add a personal touch to her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!
programme.desc: It's shopping chaos at Kleinfeld's blow-out sale! Danielle and Kathryn want the same gown- but there's only one and Jessica is in search of one very specific dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Challenge after Challenge
programme.desc: Rebekah is a survivor of the Boston Marathon bombings, and she has just one month to find a dress for her dream wedding. Tall bride Gianna needs a gown with extra length, but she has high expectations for the 'once-in-a-lifetime' dress she envisions.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Just Showed You the Door!
programme.desc: Twins Marlo and Margo are back, but this time, Marlo is the bride. Karma can be cruel as Margo's sass is unleashed and family drama further escalates when a major secret is revealed. Bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Darcey's Continuing Journey
programme.desc: Take a look back at Darcey's journey.

programme.title: Unpolished: All Shook Up
programme.desc: Lexi finally spills what's been bothering her about Matt all of these years, and a divide forms in the family. Bria and Matt isolate themselves while Lexi throws herself into work with a 3-D nail build that challenges her skills.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Darcey's Continuing Journey
programme.desc: Take a look back at Darcey's journey.

programme.title: Unpolished: All Shook Up
programme.desc: Lexi finally spills what's been bothering her about Matt all of these years, and a divide forms in the family. Bria and Matt isolate themselves while Lexi throws herself into work with a 3-D nail build that challenges her skills.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 10 Years Later and Busier Than Ever!
programme.desc: Brides and viewers have been 'saying yes' for 10 incredible years. When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and consultant Shay have a dress disagreement. Then, bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Shay Way
programme.desc: Jamiee and her fiancée Lisa are shopping together. To keep the brides from seeing their final looks, the consultants plan a wild surprise. Can wedding planner Michelle let go and enjoy being the bride? Shay confronts Randy about the elephant in the room.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More, More, More!
programme.desc: Rasha needs a huge ball gown that will wow all 700 guests at her wedding. Melissa's dad has a special surprise for her when she wants more bling. Burcu needs a personal touch from Pnina when she finds her dress to be lacking in sparkle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It Fits, She Scores!
programme.desc: Kristi is marrying a pro-baseball pitcher and is looking for a glitzy dress to compliment her luxurious lifestyle. Sports fan Jenna wants a dress that will knock it out of the park. Jennifer hopes that her boss will help her find the dress of her dreams.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: For His Consideration
programme.desc: Fashionista Britanny shops with her beloved uncle, who insists her dress has lots of sparkle. Nicole is an excited daddy's girl whose dad is just as delighted and desperate to please. Andrea wants a fancy lace gown for her manor wedding in Michigan.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Kleinfeld Family Affair
programme.desc: Carolina is an editor for 'Say Yes' and is seeking the Kleinfeld experience first-hand. Danielle, close family friend of Dorothy, has a very special surprise in store. Consultant Katie is delighted to turn customer for the day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Tight, Strapless and Sexy!
programme.desc: Whytnee wants a sexy dress to suit her vixen image, Carla wants to show more skin than her mother would like, and 52-years-young Dina is ready to try on her gown, saying it will fit right if it fits tight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Karina's Story
programme.desc: Unable to stand for more than a short period of time, Karina's weight has placed a burden on her parents and driven a wedge between her and her sister.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia's Story

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Actress Lacey Chabert and Rob break down old folk's 'last minute adventures,' and lovers' 'tender moments,' while Lacey explains why it's not always easy 'acting sexy.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Action sports personality The Dingo joins Rob in breaking down Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios and things That'll Cost You.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XCVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo try to calm down some "underragers," set their aqualarms, and try to decide whether certain stunts are all risk, no reward.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dan Heaton
programme.desc: Witness a merry-go-round of pain; guest unicyclist Dan Heaton shows off some Uni-Psychos.

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo hire some tipsy maids, have some random people air dropped, and take time for self-reflection.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Winter Holidays
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling celebrate the Winter Holiday Season with by flying home in 'beware the air', get festive in 'wreckorations' and let tempers fly in 'holiday hostility'.

programme.title: Movie: Die Hard
programme.desc: A cop visiting from New York helps stop some terrorists in his wife's business building.

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids behave, so she averts any disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: 11 Louds a Leapin'
programme.desc: The Louds are getting ready for Christmas, when the unthinkable happens to Lincoln; his sled goes in the neighbour's yard. Lincoln and Clyde attempt to pull off a sled-rescue-mission and end up finding secrets about Mr. Grouse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Power Play With the Casagrandes/ Room for Improvement With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage. Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Loud House: Snow Way Out/ Snow Way Down

programme.title: Top Elf: Grand Finale

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
programme.desc: Plankton gets all of Bikini Bottom's residents on Santa's 'naughty' list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece/ Whelk Attack
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab. Giant sea whelks terrorize the folks of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Finds Out
programme.desc: While Ross is away in China, Rachel learns that he has been in love with her for years.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rachel anxiously waits for Ross at the airport in order to tell him that she loves him.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Finds Out
programme.desc: Ross becomes very upset when Rachel leaves a message saying that she is over him.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Prom Video

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross and Rachel ...You Know

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: When Ross and Rachel get into a heated argument, Rachel suggests they take a break.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Morning After
programme.desc: After cooling off, Rachel realizes she wants Ross, who is hiding his affair.

programme.title: Mom: Pudding and a Screen Door

programme.title: Mom: Charlotte Bronte and a Backhoe

programme.title: Mom: Esta Loca and a Little Klingon
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help get Jill sober again, and Christy's boyfriend is less than understanding when it ruins his birthday weekend.

programme.title: Mom: Eight Cats and the Hat Show

programme.title: George Lopez: George Watcha's Out for Jason

programme.title: George Lopez: George Needs Anchor Management
programme.desc: When Angie meets an old flame who is now a news anchor, George becomes jealous.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Is Being Elfish and Christ-Misses His Family
programme.desc: George tells a white lie to avoid visiting Angie's family for the holidays, but regrets it when he ends up spending Christmas alone.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Extreme Makeover: Holmes Edition
programme.desc: George's building plans for an office don't pass muster with Angie or the city inspector.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: 44 Cats: Recycling Romp
programme.desc: Boss, Blister and Scab toss objects in the garden, but our furry fellows recycle them to build toys.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Scrozzle's Revenge
programme.desc: When the Rangers get trapped inside holiday ornaments, their Beast Bots must save both the Rangers and the city.

programme.title: The Smurfs: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: At Christmas, Grouchy Smurf behaves badly to everyone and it takes the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future to teach him to appreciate Christmas.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
programme.desc: Plankton gets all of Bikini Bottom's residents on Santa's 'naughty' list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Hankering/ Plankton's Old Chum
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising. Plankton tricks SpongeBob into hiding his rotten chum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy the Pirate Presents the SpongeBob SquarePants Christmas Special
programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mimic Madness/ House Worming
programme.desc: When worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, it's up to him to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goons on the Moon
programme.desc: Sandy takes her 'Science Scout' troop on a trip to the moon.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Arkansas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite flood leaves 20 dead, including 7 children.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Deadliest Mudslide
programme.desc: A mudslide in Washington State, triggered by heavy rainfall, rips through a hillside community, killing 43 people.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Chopper Down
programme.desc: Despite being the choice vehicle for remote rescues and rapid responses, helicopters have their own set of dangers.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Severe Weather
programme.desc: Featuring thunderstorms, wind shear and microbursts that can bring down a plane.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Who's Flying
programme.desc: Technology has made flying safer, but it can fail. These tragic crashes illustrate how automation can never replace the skills of a good pilot.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Nerves of Steel
programme.desc: A whiteout pile-up scatters heavy I-beams across the highway, testing James and his crew; Kevin must lift a 20,000-pound chunk of steel off the road. Herb's crew stares down a huge mess and a marathon recovery in tough condition.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Camp
programme.desc: The Air Force invades the hangar and clashes with Chuck. Mikey trains for High Arctic survival, while Joe faces tough competition at a California auction.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Hurricane Maria
programme.desc: The SOS team visits Puerto Rico to hear compelling stories from the survivors of Hurricane Maria.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Grand Canyon Blizzard
programme.desc: When the Klein family get stuck in the mud on a forest road on the way to Grand Canyon National Park, they have no idea a blizzard is about to roar through the area.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Whiteout in the Wild
programme.desc: Suzanne and Jim Shemwell head out for a simple afternoon snowmobile excursion in the Boise National Forest. After a freak accident they are stranded overnight as a massive snowstorm blows in.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Bumpy Ride

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Over-Grooming Situation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.desc: Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. Later, Danny's bandmate Stoney gets in a fender bender and its Danny to the rescue.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Back in Time
programme.desc: Two brothers want to surprise their dad with the ultimate car guy gift: a fully restored 1957 Special Edition T-Bird that's been sitting in the family's pasture for many years. Mike and Ryan find an unusual car collector with some very unusual rides.

programme.title: American Pickers: Cowboys and Cobwebs

programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning. All that's left behind is a single palm print. Investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Holiday Terror
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Mourning
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Massacre
programme.desc: The Ortega family’s annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower, opens fire. Detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Heartbreak
programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning. All that's left behind is a single palm print. Investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, a young couple is found murdered inside their Florida home. Neighbors can't imagine the couple had been in the area long enough to make a mortal enemy. Police uncover deeply personal details, and soon expose a deadly secret.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Carnage in Carnation
programme.desc: The holiday season screeches to a halt when six members of the Anderson family are discovered to have been gunned down in their home. Detectives work closely with family friends to track down the shocking murderer.

programme.title: Dateline: Robert Durst: The Lost Years
programme.desc: Robert Durst's close friends and family speak out for the first time since his arrest for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Family Business

programme.title: Dateline: Family Business

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lewis and Machuca
programme.desc: In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people out doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Skeptic
programme.desc: Lisa unearths a skeleton in the meadow where a new mega-mall is being constructed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Realty Bites
programme.desc: Marge is tired of working around the house and decides to pursue a real estate career.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miracle on Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: When Bart wakes up early on Christmas morning to play with his presents, he accidentally burns down the family's Christmas tree and ruins all the gifts. To cover his tracks, he buries the evidence in the yard and tells the family he saw a burglar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All Singing, All Dancing
programme.desc: Homer sings the blues when he realizes that a 'shoot'em-up' movie is really a musical. The rest of the family uses flashbacks to remind him about how many times he and others Springfield residents have broken into song and dance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Carney
programme.desc: Homer invites carnies to live with his family, but they steal the Simpsons' home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Joy of Sect
programme.desc: Homer is brainwashed into joining a cult that is taking over Springfield. The family moves to an agricultural compound to pick beans, but Marge manages to escape and sets out to deprogram her loved ones.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Das Bus
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are in a United Nations club with other kids and set out on a field trip. An accident results in the students becoming stranded on a deserted island. Meanwhile, Homer decides to create his own Internet company.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Temptation of Krusty
programme.desc: Bart pleads with Jay Leno to include Krusty as part of a charity stand-up comedy event, but Krusty's typical routine bombs. While announcing his retirement, Krusty's brutal honesty wins over the crowd and he soon finds his career is rejuvenated.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dumbbell Indemnity
programme.desc: Moe and Homer hatch an insurance scam to get money for Moe's new girlfriend, Renee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Simpson
programme.desc: Lisa begins to fear that the Simpson gene is causing her to grow stupid. Homer tries to comfort her by reuniting every Simpson and asking them what they do. Meanwhile, Apu senses a business opportunity when Abe's friend freezes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: This Little Wiggy
programme.desc: Bart and Ralph Wiggum go on an adventure when they find a master key to the city.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpson Tide
programme.desc: After being fired, Homer proceeds full speed ahead with a career in the naval reserve.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Trouble With Trillions
programme.desc: When Homer finds himself the subject of a tax audit, he works a deal with the IRS.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girly Edition
programme.desc: Bart sets out to steal the spotlight when Lisa becomes the anchor of a news program for kids. Meanwhile, Homer lies and gets himself a helper monkey, who does not see eye-to-eye with Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trash of the Titans
programme.desc: Homer insults his garbage men and when his trash is uncollected, he runs for Commissioner.

programme.title: The Simpsons: King of the Hill
programme.desc: Homer gets into shape and attempts to climb Springfield's most treacherous mountain.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Our Lisa
programme.desc: Determined to go to the museum, Lisa tricks Homer into allowing her to take the bus alone.

programme.desc: Marge and Homer bare their souls, and a lot more, by making love in dangerous places.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lard of the Dance
programme.desc: Homer greases up Bart with another one of his get-rich schemes; Lisa struggles at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wizard of Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: Homer finally invents something that works and he makes sure that nothing similar exists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Mother
programme.desc: Bart becomes the proud caretaker of a species that could endanger life in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IX
programme.desc: Homer is possessed by a recently executed convict after using his scalp as a toupee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: When You Dish Upon a Star

programme.title: The Simpsons: D'oh-in' in the Wind
programme.desc: On a personal quest, Homer digs into his mother's past and discovers his middle name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Gets an A
programme.desc: Lisa cheats on a school test and achieves stardom when she scores exceptionally high.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson in: 'Kidney Trouble'
programme.desc: When Homer refuses to make a rest stop on the way home, Grampa's kidneys burst.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mayored to the Mob
programme.desc: Homer takes on gangsters when he is hired as Mayor Quimby's bodyguard.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Viva Ned Flanders
programme.desc: Feeling as though life is passing him by, Ned takes a gambling vacation in Sin City.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Wild Barts Can't Be Broken
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum falsely accuses Springfield's children of vandalism and imposes a curfew.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sunday, Cruddy Sunday

programme.desc: Homer gets everyone to embrace humiliation in order to win a contest; Lisa joins MENSA.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beyond Blunderdome
programme.desc: Homer gives his honest opinion to Mel Gibson at a test screening of Mel's new film.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Madagascar: Land of Heat and Dust
programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.desc: Charismatic businessman George Jodoin is found dead in the little town of Auburn, New Hampshire. Suspicion looms amongst of small group of friends as detectives try to get to the bottom of the case.

programme.title: Betrayed: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Driven by youth, music, and her faith, Janet Chandler has dreams and aspirations of a life much larger than the small Midwestern town where she grew up. Sadly, those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: No Escape
programme.desc: Susan Smith, a big dreamer stuck in a rural town, becomes an FBI informant to protect her kids from her jealous husband's criminal friends… but her desire to do the right thing brings hellish consequences.

programme.title: Betrayed: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Janet Walsh is a young divorcée enjoying the single life, celebrating her freedom with a wild girls' night out at the local disco… and when she's found dead the next morning, it takes a determined officer 35 years to bring her murder to justice.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Welcome to the Murderhood
programme.desc: 40-year-old Priscilla Strole is looking for a fresh start when she and her teenage son Kyle move to the small town of Fairfield, California. Little does she know, new beginnings lead to her untimely end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blinded by Betrayal
programme.desc: Yelena Zakin's dream life is upturned by her husband Andrew's interest in his new, scheming secretary, her strange fiancé, and Andrew's ambitious protégé. For Yelena, it's a lethal combination.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Egg Feeder Barn Doors
programme.desc: Bug and the gang are tasked with one of the most dangerous salvage projects to date: bringing down a structure without damaging the building it's attached to.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Navy Seal Boat
programme.desc: The Dawgs travel to a shipyard in Norfolk, VA, to salvage a boat once used for Navy SEAL insertions. The team manage to salvage some key items, but their energy and patience is tested once they realize the boat won't fit on the trailer.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peacock Salem Cleaners
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Salem, VA to salvage the old Salem Peacock Cleaners. The 100-year-old building is filled with antique laundromat parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage returns to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania to get what they left behind from the first salvage. This time they concentrate on the outside including the roof tiles, windows, and the boiler room.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Storybook Style House
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels south to Winston Salem, North Carolina to save what they can from this storybook style home in two days. They get some unique chandeliers, sinks, and windows from this Robert Byrd house.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Victorian Free Classic House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs return to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage another home before it gets demolished. The house has some great Eastlake hardware worth salvaging as well as Majorca tile, mantles and pocket doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Build Begins
programme.desc: After years spent traveling and working around the globe, Jon and Etta Smith are settling down with their 18-month-old daughter, Syndi. In one of the most remote corners of northwestern Montana, they are building a home and bison ranch off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Race Against Winter
programme.desc: Jon and Etta Smith's build is under way, and they're working to balance ranch and build duties. In Montana's northwest, they have little time to waste, winter is severe, and it's coming fast.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Bison Comes Home
programme.desc: Jon and Etta are in a race against time on their Montana house build, but it's not just the house that has them working around the clock: they're also building a bison ranch from the ground up.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Montana Time
programme.desc: Jon and Etta Smith have built their off-the-grid house from the foundation up to the roof, but this late into the winter, they're forced to deal with bitter cold and high winds every day.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work
programme.desc: In a mad dash to finish the exterior of their house before another big Montana storm hits, Jon and Etta's interior work has been put on hold. With cold temperatures and little daylight to work with, every baby step they make is a victory in its own right.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Dreams Become Reality
programme.desc: After construction delays pushed construction into the dead of winter, Jon and Etta Smith are nearing the end of the build. The finishing touches, including the custom stone fireplace, solar panels, and furniture are put into place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.desc: One of the founders of The Home Depot reveals the secrets to his success. Ken Langone lived a true rags to riches story. Find out what really motivates him, and how he feels about the current batch of presidential contenders.

programme.title: 9/11: Escape From the Towers
programme.desc: Each World Trade Center tower consisted of 110 floors. Each floor has a story. In this two-hour special, survivors from two of those floors, many speaking publicly for the first time, tell their stories.

programme.title: Maury: Is the Man I Love Cheating In Our Storage Locker?
programme.desc: After a grocery store encounter, Kim believed she'd found true love with Terrence. Now engaged and expecting a child, Kim's concerned that Terrence is being unfaithful. Sabrina thinks her boyfriend, Shane, does more than just text other women.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring; the defendant claims her ex-fiancé is a and she shouldn’t have to return the ring. Then, neighbours dispute a botched car sale where the seller didn't mention the car was repossessed.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly's Out of Town
programme.desc: Mike goes on a junk food binge to cope with missing Molly while she is out of town for a teacher’s conference. Meanwhile, Carl contemplates leaving Chicago after learning heartbreaking news from James.

programme.title: Mom: Toilet Wine and the Earl of Sandwich
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help Regina tie up loose ends on the way to drop her off at prison. Meanwhile, Alvin spends the day getting to know his grandkids.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us: Penn & Teller Cure the Common Code
programme.desc: Magicians include: Anna DeGuzman; Raffaele Scircoli; Allen Abbott; and Axel Hecklau.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Chris Hardwick
programme.desc: Guest comedian Chris Hardwick, puts their comedic skills to the test through a series of spontaneous improv games that are prompted only by random ideas supplied by the studio audience.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Tinashe
programme.desc: Singing for your enjoyment with guest star appearance by Tinashe. Today's guest comedian in Jeff Davis.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Ross dates a beautiful palaeontologist, but her filthy apartment disgusts him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Baby Shower
programme.desc: Elaine asks Jerry to use his apartment for a baby shower. Kramer sells Jerry on the idea of getting an illegal cable hook-up.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: 'Tis the Season to Be Molly
programme.desc: Mike assures Molly he'll be home in time for Christmas Eve dinner until he and Carl end up in the back of a stolen truck. Meanwhile, Molly is upset with Vince for trying to change the family's Christmas traditions.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey
programme.desc: Walden and Alan are determined to convince their foster child, Louis, that Santa Claus is real.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Tasty Boys
programme.desc: Murray doesn't budge when Beverly wants to remodel their kitchen like the Kremps, so Beverly devises a plan to do the work herself. She messes it up on purpose so Murray will be forced to fix it, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: O Captain! My Captain!
programme.desc: Beverly substitutes for Barry's chemistry class in hopes of inspiring the students in the same way as Mr. Keating from 'Dead Poets Society,' much to Barry’s embarrassment.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Free Money
programme.desc: When Caroline and Max join Sophie at the racetrack as guests of Sophie's new bookie boyfriend, Caroline's reignited love for horse racing gets out of hand.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Never Surrender
programme.desc: Malik tries to end things with Parker so he can live an honest life with Jenna, but things don't go exactly as planned. Meanwhile, Tasha's epic lie about her relationship with Dante comes to a screeching halt.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Elfie
programme.desc: In the spirit of Christmas, the sometimes self-absorbed Mandy plays Santa by anonymously arranging a holiday surprise for Blanca, the Baxters' housekeeper. Also, when Vanessa gives Boyd a 'magical' elf doll, Ryan wants to tell Boyd it is just a doll.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: The Cape of Good Hope
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head to Cape Town where they stop traffic for travelling baboons. Then on the beach they encounter African penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: Jack and his grandson encounter an elephant road block, migrating pelicans, baboons, and hippos in Lake Manyara National Park in Tanzania.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Exploring Otavalo
programme.desc: Jack is in Ecuador's highlands where he visits a colourful Ecuadorian market then heads to Parque Condor, a rehabilitation center for birds of prey who've been injured.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Built for Speed
programme.desc: Season Heights NJ is scrambling to bring the pier in boardwalk. A compact Italian concrete crushers makes quick work of an old slab for new fill in Pt. Pleasant. Then Richard learns how the Manasquan house is built in the factory in less than a week.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Preservation and Determination
programme.desc: Kid Conservationists explore unique animals of the rainforest, and a dog-loving collegiate helps train service dogs for people with disabilities. Plus: a visit to the vet and tips for your pet, and a specialty service dog transforms a girl’s life.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Globe Maker
programme.desc: Alie shows us the London innovator creating artistic globes of the world, how to turn your old smartphones into a security system, the amazing designs of magnetic liquid, and farmers saving water with the Tree TeePee.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Tribes of Southern Ethiopia
programme.desc: A life-changing journey to visit some of the most remote and culturally intact tribes in the world.

programme.title: Movie: Eve's Christmas
programme.desc: An executive about to become a partner in her firm re-evaluates her life on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.desc: Rose uncovers Alan's Ponzi scheme and Alan, in turn, meets 'Manny,' Rose's mannequin 'husband.'

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Surprise
